backend.name: sglang
backend.installation: editable source install with the srt_mps extra in an isolated environment

apple_install_transformation.operation: moved the tracked CUDA-oriented python/pyproject.toml to python/pyproject_cuda.toml, then moved tracked python/pyproject_other.toml to python/pyproject.toml before the editable install

model_revision_resolution.interpretation: The unpinned MLX Hub lookup resolved to the requested immutable commit during this observation. The SGLang CLI revision flag alone does not guarantee that result for a future run.
model_revision_resolution.required_reproducer_change: Pass the absolute immutable snapshot directory as model-path so the MLX weight loader cannot resolve a moving Hub ref.

model_code_safety.flag_scope_in_mlx_path: forwarded as tokenizer_config only; not a general MLX-LM model-code guard
model_code_safety.interpretation: This specific inspected snapshot used MLX-LM's built-in Mixtral implementation. MLX-LM permits Python files and executes config.model_file when present, irrespective of this SGLang flag.

protocol.prompt_source: manual smoke input; plaintext intentionally omitted from checked artifacts

negative_probe.outcome: server reached startup but the first warmup generation failed
negative_probe.error: [rope] dims must be even but got 1
negative_probe.cause: the synthetic checkpoint has attention head dimension 1, which the MLX RoPE kernel rejects

limitations: This is one post-startup generation smoke request, not a latency or throughput benchmark.
The reusable probe supports repeated trials, but this checked record contains one measured request only.
The prompt hash detects equality but cannot reconstruct the intentionally omitted prompt; this one request is therefore not independently reproducible from the checked record.
The original manual request did not set sampling_seed. It was greedy, and the server-reported process seed is retained, but a repeatable probe should set sampling_seed explicitly.
SGLang did not forward --revision into mlx_lm.load; the Hub main ref happened to resolve to the requested commit and was verified after the run, but future runs must use the absolute snapshot path.

trust_remote_code=false was tokenizer-scoped in this MLX path. Safety for this run comes from inspecting the resolved config and absence of snapshot Python files, not from treating the flag as a general guard.
The editable source tree includes the documented Apple pyproject substitution and was dirty relative to the release tag; both transformed file hashes are recorded.
The SGLang server is an external serving path and is not registered as an Inkling Quant Lab runtime adapter.
Forward loss, internal routing capture, quantized serving, and export/reload were not validated through SGLang.
The publisher states that the checkpoint router is random, so this run is not evidence of learned expert specialization.
The isolated install used the LLM-only srt_mps extra rather than the larger all_mps extra that also includes diffusion dependencies.
